CREATE WINDOW my_window AS SELECT * FROM my_table ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING;
COMMENT ON WINDOW my_window IS 'This window calculates over the entire dataset';
COMMENT ON WINDOW my_window IS NULL;
CREATE WINDOW temperature_window AS SELECT sensor_id, AVG(temperature) FROM sensor_data GROUP BY sensor_id;
COMMENT ON WINDOW temperature_window IS 'Averages temperature readings per sensor';
CREATE WINDOW sales_window AS SELECT product_id, SUM(sales) OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY sale_date) FROM sales_data;
COMMENT ON WINDOW sales_window IS 'Cumulative sales per product';
SELECT product_id, sales_window FROM sales_data WHERE sales_window IS NOT NULL;
COMMENT ON WINDOW FUNCTION sys.stddev IS 'computes the standard deviation of a group of numeric values';
COMMENT ON WINDOW invalid_window IS 'This window does not exist';
COMMENT ON WINDOW my_window IS 'This should not work, window is dropped';
CREATE TABLE temp_data (id INT, temp FLOAT);
CREATE WINDOW temp_avg_window AS SELECT AVG(temp) FROM temp_data;
COMMENT ON WINDOW temp_avg_window IS 'This window provides average temperature readings';
CREATE WINDOW complex_window AS SELECT a.id, b.value FROM table_a a JOIN table_b b ON a.id = b.id WHERE a.date > '2023-01-01';
COMMENT ON WINDOW complex_window IS 'A complex window using joins to gather data';
